title: Hellgate Senigallia Remake
description:
DOPED GAMES IS PROUD TO PRESENT:

"HELLGATE SENIGALLIA REMAKE"

(from the Level designer of Grezzodue2, developer of Topolino Amico delle Guardie, Hellgate Senigallia, and Deep).

Dive into the adventure and fight off hordes of paranormal beings in this old-school FPS (boomer shooter) with dark and mysterious tones! Save the small town of Senigallia (not everything can happen in New York!), stop the advancing evil, and show what you're made of! New weapons, 12 massive levels, new enemies, new quests, new NPCs, a completely revamped RPG gameplay, and an epic original soundtrack! (Sik, Steven Larsen, Rick Dope, Above The Tree, Between Balls and Ass...)!
description_short: An RPG-infused boomer-shooter with dark and mysterious tones, offering innovative gameplay with a nostalgic nod to the '90s. Get ready to blow everything up and turn enemies into cannon fodder before facing the massive end-level bosses!
